translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God, and Timothy our brother,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: to the saints and faithful brothers  in Christ at Colossae: Grace to you and peace from God our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: We give thanks to God the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, praying always for you,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: having heard of your faith in Christ Jesus, and of the love which you have toward all the saints,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: because of the hope which is laid up for you in the heavens, of which you heard before in the word of the truth of the Good News,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: which has come to you; even as it is in all the world and is bearing fruit and growing, as it does in you also, since the day you heard and knew the grace of God in truth;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: even as you learned of Epaphras our beloved fellow servant, who is a faithful servant of Christ on our behalf,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who also declared to us your love in the Spirit.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For this cause, we also, since the day we heard this, don’t cease praying and making requests for you, that you may be filled with the knowledge of his will in all spiritual wisdom and understanding,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that you may walk worthily of the Lord, to please him in all respects, bearing fruit in every good work, and increasing in the knowledge of God;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: strengthened with all power, according to the might of his glory, for all endurance and perseverance with joy;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: giving thanks to the Father, who made us fit to be partakers of the inheritance of the saints in light;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who delivered us out of the power of darkness, and translated us into the Kingdom of the Son of his love;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: in whom we have our redemption,  the forgiveness of our sins;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of all creation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For by him all things were created, in the heavens and on the earth, things visible and things invisible, whether thrones or dominions or principalities or powers; all things have been created through him, and for him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He is before all things, and in him all things are held together.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He is the head of the body, the assembly, who is the beginning, the firstborn from the dead; that in all things he might have the preeminence.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For all the fullness was pleased to dwell in him;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and through him to reconcile all things to himself, by him, whether things on the earth, or things in the heavens, having made peace through the blood of his cross.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You, being in past times alienated and enemies in your mind in your evil deeds,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: yet now he has reconciled in the body of his flesh through death, to present you holy and without defect and blameless before him,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: if it is so that you continue in the faith, grounded and steadfast, and not moved away from the hope of the Good News which you heard, which is being proclaimed in all creation under heaven; of which I, Paul, was made a servant.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now I rejoice in my sufferings for your sake, and fill up on my part that which is lacking of the afflictions of Christ in my flesh for his body’s sake, which is the assembly;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: of which I was made a servant, according to the stewardship of God which was given me toward you, to fulfill the word of God,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: the mystery which has been hidden for ages and generations. But now it has been revealed to his saints,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: to whom God was pleased to make known what are the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles, which is Christ in you, the hope of glory;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: whom we proclaim, admonishing every man and teaching every man in all wisdom, that we may present every man perfect in Christ Jesus;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: for which I also labor, striving according to his working, which works in me mightily.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For I desire to have you know how greatly I struggle for you, and for those at Laodicea, and for as many as have not seen my face in the flesh;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that their hearts may be comforted, they being knit together in love, and gaining all riches of the full assurance of understanding, that they may know the mystery of God, both of the Father and of Christ,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: in whom are all the treasures of wisdom and knowledge hidden.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now this I say that no one may delude you with persuasiveness of speech.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For though I am absent in the flesh, yet am I with you in the spirit, rejoicing and seeing your order, and the steadfastness of your faith in Christ.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As therefore you received Christ Jesus, the Lord, walk in him,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: rooted and built up in him, and established in the faith, even as you were taught, abounding in it in thanksgiving.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Be careful that you don’t let anyone rob you through his philosophy and vain deceit, after the tradition of men, after the elements of the world, and not after Christ.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For in him all the fullness of the Godhead dwells bodily,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and in him you are made full, who is the head of all principality and power;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: in whom you were also circumcised with a circumcision not made with hands, in the putting off of the body of the sins of the flesh, in the circumcision of Christ;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: having been buried with him in baptism, in which you were also raised with him through faith in the working of God, who raised him from the dead.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You were dead through your trespasses and the uncircumcision of your flesh. He made you alive together with him, having forgiven us all our trespasses,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: wiping out the handwriting in ordinances which was against us; and he has taken it out of the way, nailing it to the cross;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: having stripped the principalities and the powers, he made a show of them openly, triumphing over them in it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let no one therefore judge you in eating, or in drinking, or with respect to a feast day or a new moon or a Sabbath day,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: which are a shadow of the things to come; but the body is Christ’s.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let no one rob you of your prize by a voluntary humility and worshiping of the angels, dwelling in the things which he has not seen, vainly puffed up by his fleshly mind,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and not holding firmly to the Head, from whom all the body, being supplied and knit together through the joints and ligaments, grows with God’s growth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If you died with Christ from the elements of the world, why, as though living in the world, do you subject yourselves to ordinances,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “Don’t handle, nor taste, nor touch”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: (all of which perish with use), according to the precepts and doctrines of men?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Which things indeed appear like wisdom in self-imposed worship, and humility, and severity to the body; but aren’t of any value against the indulgence of the flesh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If then you were raised together with Christ, seek the things that are above, where Christ is, seated on the right hand of God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Set your mind on the things that are above, not on the things that are on the earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When Christ, our life, is revealed, then you will also be revealed with him in glory.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Put to death therefore your members which are on the earth: sexual immorality, uncleanness, depraved passion, evil desire, and covetousness, which is idolatry;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: for which things’ sake the wrath of God comes on the children of disobedience.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You also once walked in those, when you lived in them;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but now you also put them all away: anger, wrath, malice, slander, and shameful speaking out of your mouth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t lie to one another, seeing that you have put off the old man with his doings,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and have put on the new man, who is being renewed in knowledge after the image of his Creator,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: where there can’t be Greek and Jew, circumcision and uncircumcision, barbarian, Scythian, bondservant, freeman; but Christ is all, and in all.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Put on therefore, as God’s chosen ones, holy and beloved, a heart of compassion, kindness, lowliness, humility, and perseverance;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: bearing with one another, and forgiving each other, if any man has a complaint against any; even as Christ forgave you, so you also do.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Above all these things, walk in love, which is the bond of perfection.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And let the peace of God rule in your hearts, to which also you were called in one body; and be thankful.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly; in all wisdom teaching and admonishing one another with psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, singing with grace in your heart to the Lord.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Whatever you do, in word or in deed, do all in the name of the Lord Jesus, giving thanks to God the Father, through him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Wives, be in subjection to your husbands, as is fitting in the Lord.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Husbands, love your wives, and don’t be bitter against them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Children, obey your parents in all things, for this pleases the Lord.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Fathers, don’t provoke your children, so that they won’t be discouraged.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Servants, obey in all things those who are your masters according to the flesh, not just when they are looking, as men pleasers, but in singleness of heart, fearing God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord, and not for men,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: knowing that from the Lord you will receive the reward of the inheritance; for you serve the Lord Christ.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But he who does wrong will receive again for the wrong that he has done, and there is no partiality.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Masters, give to your servants that which is just and equal, knowing that you also have a Master in heaven.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Continue steadfastly in prayer, watching therein with thanksgiving;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: praying together for us also, that God may open to us a door for the word, to speak the mystery of Christ, for which I am also in bonds;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that I may reveal it as I ought to speak.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Walk in wisdom toward those who are outside, redeeming the time.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let your speech always be with grace, seasoned with salt, that you may know how you ought to answer each one.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All my affairs will be made known to you by Tychicus, the beloved brother, faithful servant, and fellow bondservant in the Lord.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am sending him to you for this very purpose, that he may know your circumstances and comfort your hearts,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: together with Onesimus, the faithful and beloved brother, who is one of you. They will make known to you everything that is going on here.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner, greets you, and Mark, the cousin of Barnabas (concerning whom you received commandments, “if he comes to you, receive him”),

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and Jesus who is called Justus. These are my only fellow workers for God’s Kingdom who are of the circumcision, men who have been a comfort to me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Epaphras, who is one of you, a servant of Christ, salutes you, always striving for you in his prayers, that you may stand perfect and complete in all the will of God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For I testify about him, that he has great zeal for you, and for those in Laodicea, and for those in Hierapolis.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Luke, the beloved physician, and Demas greet you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Greet the brothers who are in Laodicea, and Nymphas, and the assembly that is in his house.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When this letter has been read among you, cause it to be read also in the assembly of the Laodiceans; and that you also read the letter from Laodicea.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Tell Archippus, “Take heed to the ministry which you have received in the Lord, that you fulfill it.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The salutation of me, Paul, with my own hand: remember my bonds. Grace be with you. Amen.
